property.name: ranger.plugin.hive.policy.source.impl
property.description: Class to retrieve policies from the source

property.name: ranger.plugin.hive.policy.pollIntervalMs
property.description: How often to poll for changes in policies?

property.name: ranger.plugin.hive.policy.cache.dir
property.description: Directory where Ranger policies are cached

property.name: xasecure.hive.update.xapolicies.on.grant.revoke
property.description: Should Hive plugin update Ranger policies for GRANT/REVOKE?

property.name: ranger.plugin.hive.policy.rest.client.connection.timeoutMs
property.description: RangerRestClient Connection Timeout in Milli Seconds

property.name: ranger.plugin.hive.policy.rest.client.read.timeoutMs
property.description: RangerRestClient read Timeout in Milli Seconds

property.name: xasecure.hive.uri.permission.coarse.check
property.description: Skip recursive permission check for URIs.
